messages.text: I packed Ira's daycare bag but pls check milk bottle once. I can do pickup if your 5pm doesn't spill over, otherwise tell me early.
Roadmap review is pure theatre bro. Everyone knows Q3 is fantasy but founder optimism has entered cinema level.
Leaving early today, promise. Have office so will try to get out before traffic becomes full HSR tragedy.
Quick update: OKR alignment is mostly closed. Only dependency risk is eng bandwidth on billing APIs; flagging now so it doesn't become a week-4 surprise.
Still stuck at office. Can you handle dinner for Ira today? Sorry, I know this is becoming annoying.
Voice note: bhai this review deck has become a circus. Same three slides, five opinions, zero decisions. I am losing it quietly.
You said you would do breakfast today. I had to join my call with Ira crying next to me. This is not working.
Love how 'strategic ambiguity' now means nobody wants their name next to the bad decision lol.
Sorry about the morning. I know I was absent. I ordered milk and diapers; both should come before 10. Will put Ira's clothes out for tomorrow.
On pricing experiment: we can unblock with a 10% cohort and weekly guardrails. Main constraint is still instrumentation, not GTM readiness.
Need to talk sometime. Not urgent urgent. Just some head noise I don't want to put on family chat.
Leaving now. Will pick up curd on the way. Session ran a bit late, nothing major.
Ira ate half the dosa and then negotiated for banana like a VC. Swim timing Saturday 10:30 still works? We can make it a slow morning.
Aai BP is okay now, 132/84 after medicine. Sunday call don't mention stress loudly, she will make it a full investigation.
Therapy is making me realise I'm not burnt out only from work. Also startup itch is back, which is either growth or stupidity. Need some reset, fr.
I'll pack Ira's cap and snacks for Cubbon. You take water bottle? Let's leave by 8:15 before parking becomes impossible.
Mumbai update: Sameer is apparently becoming angel investor now. Matlab one exit rumor and suddenly everyone is Naval. Also how was therapy, alive?
Did Aai sound extra worried today or normal worried? She asked twice if I'm sleeping properly, so just checking what she has guessed.
Heading back now. Also, I know I've been checked out lately. Sorry. Not asking you to fix it, just saying I can see it.
Daycare drop 8:45 works. I’ll do the bag and snack box. Also, sorry I was so zoned out yesterday... not ignoring you, just fried.
QPR khatam. Nobody died. Small win lol. But Dubai ghost is back in my head for no reason, full background process.
Hey, can you send the latest Dubai stakeholder notes before pricing sync? Especially objections from Emirates NBD side and any procurement signal.
I’ll be late again, sorry. Pricing sync has become a circus. Can you handle dinner + Ira bedtime tonight? I know this is unfair.
Bhai I feel properly stuck. Work panic all day, then home guilt at night. And then my brain adds old Dubai nonsense like masala. I’m tired of myself only.
Quick summary: Dubai pricing assumes 3-year commit, 18% services load, and phased rollout across two business units. Need founder sign-off on discount guardrail before Sales reverts.
Can you add milk, curd, bananas, eggs, Ira wipes, and atta? I’ll order veggies from BB after the call.
Arre that face 😭 She looks so proud of the tiny tiffin. Thanks for sending. Made my morning genuinely better.
Aai Sunday call same 10:30? Also random q: when you knew about therapy and didn’t tell them, did it feel weird? Like we’re still teenagers hiding report cards.
Meera basically said avoidance is also a choice, brutal. Matlab doing nothing is also doing something. I hate when therapy is correct.
I’m sorry I’ve been absent this week. Not just physically late, mentally also not there. Crunch is real but I’m using it as a shield. I’ll do better tonight.
Pickup confirmed, I’ll reach by 6:45. Put phone near Ira if she’s awake? I want to send her one silly goodnight voice note.
Cubbon might be too much with parking and tantrum probability. Quiet breakfast near Jayanagar? Then park if madam approves.
Photo bhej na re of Ira and you both. Aai is asking but pretending she is not asking. Classic.
House felt normal today. Breakfast, Ira running around, Shru laughing at some stupid thing I said. And weirdly that scared me. Like I don’t deserve normal after what I’ve hidden.
Aai was doing that detective voice about me looking tired. Please deflect if she asks. Say startup workload, not sleep/meds/therapy wala topic.
Monday bags: daycare clothes, diapers, water bottle, blue shoes. I’ll pack before sleeping. Also... thanks for this weekend. It felt nice.
Can pick Ira today if your call runs over. Weekend was nice, want to keep that energy a bit. ❤️
For Dubai account, what’s our real floor on discount before CFO gets twitchy? Need guardrails before I reply.
Deleting it feels like admitting it was real, bhai. Archive is cowardly but at least it’s not a confession.
Sharing revised assumptions with a tighter discount band. We can support the commercial ask if volume ramp and annual prepay hold.
I have become one spreadsheet with anxiety and a Slack status. Please respect this transformation.
Need milk, bananas, diapers, curd. I’ll get them after office. Also sorry, I know I’ve been distracted lately.
Bro stop doing puja of the archive every night. Either delete or don’t, but don’t make it a ritual.
Could your leadership review the numbers live next week? Client side wants closure before quarter planning locks.
Dubai account may come up again next week, only for pricing review. Just flagging early so it doesn’t sound last-minute.
Meera asked what I’m protecting by not deleting. I gave some MBA answer but honestly I don’t know.
Aai, call miss zhala. Office madhye khup kaam aahe today. Ratri call karto, okay?
My recommendation is to hold discount within the revised band. Anything beyond this creates renewal risk and weakens expansion precedent.
Dubai being back on calendar doesn’t mean Feb is back. Don’t spiral and start connecting ghosts to pricing calls.
Made coffee before Ira wakes up. Yours is on the counter, less sugar like you like it.
Pune plan sounds good. Ira will go mad seeing aaji. Let’s coordinate train vs drive once Shru confirms leave.
I want the evidence gone, but some sick part of me thinks deleting it deletes proof that I was still wanted by someone. Hate typing this.
Swim class is 10:30, right? I can take Ira alone next week so you get the morning properly free.
Leaving in 20. Traffic looks manageable. What do you feel like for dinner? I can pick up something on the way.
Shru, I’ll do Ira drop today. Your 9am looks mad packed. You finish coffee at least, I’ll handle the tiny CEO.
Bro I am one Dubai calendar invite away from becoming religious. Full temple subscription model only now lol.
May have some stupid Dubai thing next week. Not confirmed yet, don’t plan around it. Will know by EOD hopefully.
Sent the metrics update like a robot. Meanwhile brain is doing 17 background jobs about Dubai. Very scalable architecture.
VN: bhai Dubai is coming back like pending karma. I know nothing ‘happened’ happened, but my chest doesn’t believe that sentence.
Dropped Ira. She cried 2 mins then went to blocks. Sorry, saw your grocery msg and forgot to reply. Will order tonight.
Any chance founders are actually going Dubai or is this just office gossip becoming my personal horror movie?
Sorry I’ve been zoned out. Not fair to you. I’ll do Ira morning routine tomorrow, you sleep 20 mins extra if she allows democracy.
Milk ordered, diapers restocked, daycare fee paid. Also packed the blue bottle. One adult function completed before 9am.
Bhai I need to clean my digital life this weekend, no jokes. I keep delaying because deleting feels like admitting.
Therapy was useful but tiring. I’ll clean kitchen, you sit. Not being noble, just need to move my hands for a bit.
Told teacher Ira has slight cough and to give extra water. No fever. Keeping phone close in case they call.
I’ll pick up Meghana on the way. Neither of us should cook today. Send order before 6 or I’ll panic-order too much biryani.
Serious q: if I delete old chats now, will I feel lighter or more like I’m hiding a body? I’m tired of being scared of my own phone.
Photo: Ira has declared this stick her ‘office laptop’. Park CEO is taking investor calls. Wish you were here.
Why are you checking Slack every 3 minutes on a Saturday? Is Dubai prep actually that messy or are you avoiding being here?
We should talk tonight after Ira sleeps. Not a fight. Just tired of guessing what mood I’m walking into.
I think Shru knows something is off. Not details, just vibes. Which somehow feels worse because I can still pretend and I hate that.
I’m anxious about work travel and it’s spilling everywhere. That’s on me. I don’t want to keep making the house feel tense.
Dubai client review might come up next week, but mostly a calendar placeholder for now. Will confirm before anything gets booked.
Exec metrics are fine, but I need the latest expansion-risk numbers before 3. Please drop the sheet link when you get a sec.
Bhai Dubai might happen again lol. Not sleeping only. Brain is doing full nautanki since morning.
No, it is not just Dubai. Work is just messy and I am carrying it badly. Sorry, I know I have been weird.
Need your inputs on the review deck by EOD. Mostly dependency slide + churn notes. Keep it tight, no narrative needed.
Sending two links. Maybe it would be good to have a neutral person help us talk, because clearly I am not doing a great job alone.
I know I have been off. Sorry. I am not trying to shut you out, I just don't know how to say half of it properly yet.
